reference: Actually, we do not know the cause of cerebral atrophy in your child, but oxygen being a cause is not possible. Developmental stimulation at neurodevelopmental centers can be helpful, and Transcranial Magnetic Stimulation for determining the cause of cerebral atrophy needs to be done.
text: Sadly, we did not know the cause of cerebral atrophy in this child. But oxygen being a cause is not possible. Developmental stimulation at neurodevelopmental centers can be helpful. Intracranial magnetic stimulation for determining the cause of cerebral atrophy needs to be done.
